name: linkedin-and-cv-builder
description: LinkedIn content strategy, CV optimization, and personal branding for senior tech professionals.

skills.name: get-user-context
skills.description: Onboarding — collect CV, LinkedIn URL, and professional context before other skills run

skills.name: notion-setup
skills.description: Create and initialize the user's Notion workspace for persistent storage

skills.name: cv-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize and rewrite CV bullets, sections, and structure for senior tech roles

skills.name: profile-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize LinkedIn headline, About section, and experience fields

skills.name: post-generator
skills.description: Generate high-quality LinkedIn posts from topics, drafts, or ideas

skills.name: trend-analyzer
skills.description: Identify high-signal content opportunities and market positioning angles
